Package Only Config Gate Fixture
=================================

This document exists solely to be compiled by
``tests/test_package_only_config_gate.py`` (GATE-01, CONF-02, CONF-03). It is
deliberately minimal -- a title and one short paragraph, no code blocks, no
math, no admonitions, no toctree -- so the real ``typst.compile()`` this gate
performs stays fast.
